name: A Father's Promise
overview: An impressive story set in the 1980s. Aras Rona and Rüçhan Rona are members of a very wealthy family. Figen Kutlu lives with her family in the mansion of the Rona family. The Rona family is forced to adopt Cemre, the daughter of Mustafa, who is on trial with the death penalty, who was given to the Child Protection Agency because his wife died

trailers.title: Dilek Taşı İlk Bölümüyle Yakında Kanal D'de!
